_comment: Generated workflow — edit via n8n Cloud UI or regenerate with build script.
name: wf-telegram-main
description: Single-trigger Telegram router: photo collection → Gemini analysis → PhotoRoom → ML publish → Wait for price. Also handles price/reject replies from employee.
flow: Telegram Trigger -> Classify (photo/analyze/price/reject) -> Switch -> [photo: store file_id in Sheets] | [analyze: download+PhotoRoom+Gemini->Wait] | [price/reject: resume Wait via webhook URL]
